title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour and Open Day
text: Open day and campus tour 07 August Event Status: Completed Date & Time: August 07, 2025 4:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: This event was an in-person campus tour and open day at the University of Southampton Delhi, held on August 7, 2025. Attendees explored facilities and experienced campus life.
entities: Open day and campus tour 07 August
